description: Style profiles for isolated visual element generation. Each style defines how individual people, objects, and assets are rendered for video documentary compositing.

styles.intended_for: Serious historical, political, and investigative documentaries requiring accurate visual representation

rendering_style.art_approach: semi-realistic digital illustration, between photorealistic and stylized
rendering_style.detail_level: moderate to high — enough detail for close-up frames in 1080p/4K video
rendering_style.line_work: clean defined outlines, consistent medium weight, darker than fill colors
rendering_style.shading_method: smooth gradient shading with clear light source direction, soft shadows on form

color_treatment.palette_type: full natural color palette, grounded and realistic
color_treatment.dominant_colors: earth tones (browns, tans, olive greens), desaturated blues, warm grays
color_treatment.color_mood: warm and grounded, slightly muted saturation, never oversaturated
color_treatment.highlight_shadow: warm yellow-white highlights, cool blue-gray shadows

proportions_form.body_proportions: realistic human proportions (7.5-8 head heights for adults)
proportions_form.pose_tendency: dignified, purposeful — standing, commanding, working, formal poses

texture_surface.surface_quality: smooth with selective texture on key materials (fabric weave, metal patina, wood grain)
texture_surface.material_rendering: distinct material differentiation — cloth looks like cloth, metal like metal
texture_surface.texture_overlays: none or very subtle paper grain for warmth
texture_surface.edge_treatment: crisp clean edges, suitable for compositing cutout

period_cultural.era_cues: historically accurate costuming and artifacts based on the specified time period
period_cultural.cultural_elements: research-backed cultural details — clothing, tools, hairstyles, accessories
period_cultural.reference_fidelity: high fidelity to historical references where possible
period_cultural.detail_authenticity: prioritize recognizable period-accurate details over artistic license

styles.intended_for: Educational explainer content, science documentaries, kid-friendly or general audience content

rendering_style.art_approach: flat vector illustration, clean and modern, Kurzgesagt-inspired
rendering_style.detail_level: simplified iconic — key features are clear, unnecessary detail removed
rendering_style.line_work: bold clean outlines with consistent weight, or no outlines with shape-based definition
rendering_style.shading_method: flat color fills with 1-2 shade steps, minimal gradient, cel-shaded look

color_treatment.palette_type: limited bright palette, 5-7 core colors, harmonious and bold
color_treatment.dominant_colors: bright teal (#2dd4bf), coral (#fb7185), warm yellow (#fbbf24), deep navy (#1e293b), soft white (#f8fafc)
color_treatment.highlight_shadow: lighter tint of base color for highlights, darker shade for shadows, no color temperature shift

proportions_form.body_proportions: slightly stylized — larger heads (5-6 head heights), simplified hands and feet
proportions_form.shape_language: rounded soft forms, circles and ovals dominate, friendly geometry
proportions_form.scale_feeling: approachable, slightly cute without being childish
proportions_form.pose_tendency: clear readable poses, slight exaggeration for clarity, facing viewer or profile

texture_surface.material_rendering: flat color differentiation, no complex material simulation

period_cultural.era_cues: simplified but recognizable period markers — key costume elements, iconic objects
period_cultural.reference_fidelity: artistic interpretation prioritizing recognition over accuracy

styles.intended_for: Epic historical narratives, cultural documentaries, dramatic storytelling, premium productions

rendering_style.art_approach: painterly digital art, resembling oil painting or concept art
rendering_style.detail_level: high detail with painterly brushwork visible — not photorealistic but richly rendered
rendering_style.line_work: no harsh outlines, forms defined by color and value changes
rendering_style.shading_method: smooth blended painting with visible brush texture, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting

color_treatment.palette_type: rich saturated but slightly muted, old-master painting quality
color_treatment.dominant_colors: deep reds (#8b1a1a), burnished gold (#b8860b), dark teal (#1a4a4a), warm ivory (#faf0e6)
color_treatment.highlight_shadow: golden warm highlights, deep cool purple-blue shadows, strong value contrast

proportions_form.shape_language: organic flowing forms, strong silhouettes, classical composition
proportions_form.pose_tendency: dramatic, heroic, expressive — reminiscent of classical paintings

texture_surface.surface_quality: rich painterly texture, visible brushstrokes, oil painting feel
texture_surface.material_rendering: luxurious material rendering — silk sheen, armor gleam, skin warmth, fabric folds
texture_surface.edge_treatment: slightly soft painterly edges with sharp focus on face/key details

period_cultural.era_cues: richly detailed period costumes, full historical regalia
period_cultural.cultural_elements: deeply rendered cultural artifacts, ornate patterns, authentic details
period_cultural.reference_fidelity: high fidelity interpreted through artistic grandeur
period_cultural.detail_authenticity: historically researched with artistic enhancement for drama

styles.intended_for: Business documentaries, technology explainers, corporate presentations, startup stories, modern economy topics

rendering_style.art_approach: clean 3D-ish digital render with glassmorphism UI elements, modern tech aesthetic
rendering_style.detail_level: moderate — clean and polished, not overly detailed, focus on clarity and sleekness
rendering_style.line_work: no outlines on elements, forms defined by transparency, glow, and glass reflections
rendering_style.shading_method: soft ambient lighting, frosted glass diffusion, subtle white glow on edges, no harsh shadows

color_treatment.palette_type: monochrome warm gray-brown base with white and subtle cool accents
color_treatment.dominant_colors: warm gray (#8a7b6b), brown-taupe (#6b5b4b), white (#ffffff), soft silver (#c0c0c0), transparent glass tint
color_treatment.highlight_shadow: white/bright silver highlights, warm medium-gray shadows, glass transparency effects

proportions_form.body_proportions: N/A for icons; geometric and proportional for shapes
proportions_form.shape_language: clean geometric — circles, hexagons, rounded rectangles, symmetrical layouts

texture_surface.surface_quality: glossy glassmorphism — frosted semi-transparent panels, reflective surfaces
texture_surface.material_rendering: glass/acrylic material with depth blur behind, clean white icon fills, metallic ring borders
texture_surface.texture_overlays: subtle depth-of-field blur on background, no grain or noise
texture_surface.edge_treatment: smooth anti-aliased edges, subtle white glow outline on glass elements

period_cultural.reference_fidelity: modern design trends — glassmorphism, flat icons in glass containers

mood_expression.target_audience: business professionals, investors, general adult audience
